memoryArtifacts.description: John Peverel-Peverly and Walter Bagnall (also known as 'Great Walt') lived on Richmond Island since 1628 and traded gold and silver coins for dried beaver hides with the Sagamore Indians who had Squid …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Life of John Peverly
memoryArtifacts.description: John Peverel-Peverly, was born about 1599, perhaps in Dorsetshire or Devonshire, England and immigrated to New England in the 1620's, possibly aboard the ship "Fortune" as early as 1621. His ancestors …

memoryArtifacts.headline: The Immigrant
memoryArtifacts.description:
JOHN PEVEREL-PEVERLY - The Immigrant
BIRTH: 1599 in Bradford-Peverell, Dorsetshire (?), England
DEATH: 3 Oct 1631 in Richmond Island, Cumberland County, Maine
BURIED: Probably on Richmond Island where …

popularStory.headline: MURDER of JOHN PEVERLY
popularStory.description: John Peverel-Peverly and Walter Bagnall (also known as 'Great Walt') lived on Richmond Island since 1628 and traded gold and silver coins for dried beaver hides with the Sagamore Indians who had Squid …

zh.Bradford Peverell, Dorset, England: 英國英格蘭多瑟特布拉德福德 培維勒爾
zh.Richmond Island, British America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加南卡羅來納州格奧智托里士滿 易曼德
zh.Richmond Island: 千里達及托巴哥托巴格里士滿 易曼德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Peverel Peverly Sr於1599年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特布拉德福德 培維勒爾時，他的父親William Peverell40歲，母親Isabella Blanche Basset21歲。他於大約1617年與Edith Wisedom在美國新罕布夏州結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1631年10月3日在千里達及托巴哥托巴格里士滿 易曼德享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Peverel Peverly Sr于1599年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特布拉德福德 培維勒爾时，他的父亲William Peverell40岁，母亲Isabella Blanche Basset21岁。他于大约1617年与Edith Wisedom在美国新罕布什尔州结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1631年10月3日在千里达及托巴哥托巴格里士滿 易曼德享年32岁。

meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Heberle  .

variants.name: Heberle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Klaus, Alois, Gottfried, Juergen.
German: diminutive of   Haber  . This surname is also found in Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Peverel

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

en.lifeSummary: When John Peverel Peverly Sr was born in 1599, in Bradford Peverell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Peverell, was 40 and his mother, Isabella Blanche Basset, was 21. He married Edith Wisedom about 1617, in New Hampshire, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 3 October 1631, in Richmond Island, Tobago, Trinidad and Tobago, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Peverel Peverly Sr est né en 1599, à Bradford Peverell, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Peverell, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabella Blanche Basset, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Edith Wisedom environ 1617, à New Hampshire, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1631, à Richmond Island, Tobago, Trinidad et Tobago, à l’âge de 32 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Peverel Peverly Srが1599年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブラドフォード ペバーエルで生まれた時，父William Peverellは40歳，母Isabella Blanche Bassetは21歳であった。約1617年にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州でEdith Wisedomと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1631年10月3日にトリニダードトバゴトバゴリチモンド イスランドで32歳で死去した。

ko.Richmond Island, British America: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 사우스캐롤라이나 주 조짓운 리ch몽 이슬랜드
ko.lifeSummary: John Peverel Peverly Sr(이)가 1599년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브래드퍼드 p에버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Peverell(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Blanche Basset(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1617년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주에서 Edith Wisedom(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1631년 10월 3일 트리니다드 토바고 토바고 리ch몽 이슬랜드에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Peverel Peverly Sr nasceu em 1599, em Bradford Peverell, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Peverell, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Blanche Basset, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith Wisedom aproximadamente 1617, em Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1631, em Richmond Island, Tobago, Trinidad e Tobago, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Peverel Peverly Sr родился в 1599 г. в местности брадфорд пивирэлл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Peverell было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Blanche Basset, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith Wisedom около 1617 г. в местности Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 3 октября 1631 г. в местности ричмонд исланд, тобаго, Тринидад и Тобаго в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Peverel Peverly Sr nació en 1599, en Bradford Peverell, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Peverell, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabella Blanche Basset, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Edith Wisedom aproximadamente 1617, en Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1631, en Richmond Island, Tobago, Trinidad y Tobago, a la edad de 32 años.
